title: juncus acutiflorus subsp. genuinus
intro: Juncus acutiflorus subsp. genuinus, commonly known as sharp-flowered rush, is a subspecies of plant in the Juncaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Juncus acutiflorus subsp. genuinus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
